S.FORM: == dadiw-milingatu mibelisiw a dadiw == ťô§ŤćČťĖčŚ∑•ś≠Ć u hay yu~ in huy yei yan in u yan u in u yei yan hei ya u hay yan u i yan ha ni hay yu in hay yan u i yei yan in u yan u i huy yei yan hei ya u hay yan u i yan ha ni hay yu in hay yan
S.PHON: == dadiw-mir~…ĺiŇčatu mib…ôr~…ĺisiw a dadiw == ***** u ńßaj ju~ in ńßuj j…ôi jan in u jan u in u j…ôi jan ńß…ôi ja u ńßaj jan u i jan ńßa ni ńßaj ju in ńßaj jan u i j…ôi jan in u jan u i ńßuj j…ôi jan ńß…ôi ja u ńßaj jan u i jan ńßa ni ńßaj ju in ńßaj jan
